code:
import io
import string

let content = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(content)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut last_was_newline = true
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(content, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 10
    count = count + 1
    last_was_newline = true
  else
    last_was_newline = false
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not last_was_newline
  count = count + 1
end
print("lines=#{count}")
